title: November 2025 Transaction Data
body: "Please note this data shows what HM Land Registry has been able to process during the time period covered and is not necessarily a reflection of market activity.  In November:      HM Land Registry completed over 1,888,060 applications to change or query the Land Register     Greater London topped the table of regional applications with 411,231    HM Land Registry completed 1,888,068 applications in November compared with 2,089,280 in October 2025 and 1,943,101last November 2024, of which:     315,721 were applications for register updates compared with 339,881 in October   1,069,299 were applications for an official copy of a register compared with 1,178,185 in October   210,324 were search and hold queries (official searches) compared with 228,940 in October   85,594 were transactions for value compared with 90,427 in October   18,993 were postal applications from non-account holders compared with 18,714 in October    Applications by region and country      Region / country September applications October applications November applications     South East 445,564 472,423 404,274   Greater London 369,405 399,205 411,231   North West 222,201 231,852 206,100   South West 195,041 200,983 177,701   West Midlands 169,672 178,659 153,912   Yorkshire and the Humber 157,342 165,374 147,573   East Midlands 148,138 153,087 135,149   North 99,051 104,194 90,699   East Anglia 83,853 88,974 75,701   Isles of Scilly 96 61 58   Wales 92,530 94,319 85,576   England and Wales (not assigned) 137 149 94   Total 1,983,030 2,089,280 1,888,068     Top 5 local authority areas   November 2025 applications     Top 5 local authority areas November applications     Hounslow 52,326   Richmond upon Thames 37,784   Birmingham 26,473   City of Westminster 24,631   North Yorkshire 21,559     Top 5 customers   November 2025 applications     Top 5 customers November applications     InfoTrack Limited 198,389   WSP Management Services Ltd 79,880   Enact 32,828   O’Neill Patient 29,872   Orbital Witness Limited 27,518     Access the full dataset on our Use land and property data service.  Next publication   Transaction Data is published on the 15th working day of each month. The December 2025 data will be published at 11am on Thursday 22 January 2026. "
